lessons.rule: Do not use 'axios'. Use native 'node:http' or 'fetch' if available. PRD V4 strictly prohibits external HTTP clients to minimize dependencies.
Do not use 'express'. Use 'fastify' for high-performance requirements as per PRD V4.
Before generating any task, confirm that the PRD (Product Requirements Document) is fully loaded and all required sections are defined; otherwise, halt and request the missing PRD content.
Files containing JSX must use the .tsx extension and include the necessary React import (or rely on automatic JSX runtime) to avoid TypeScript syntax errors during compilation.
Always validate and sanitize file paths to prevent directory traversal; reject any path that attempts to escape the project workspace.
Never allow file paths that escape the project root; validate and sanitize all paths to prevent directory traversal.
Always validate and sanitize file paths to prevent directory traversal; reject any path containing '..' or absolute paths outside the project workspace.
